items.docs: Executes a GraphQL `query` or `subscription` operation. Supported queries: `ohlcvPairs`, `ohlcvTokens`, `tokenSearch`, `topTraderWalletsForToken`, `walletPnlByToken`. Supported subscriptions (upgrade to WebSocket on the same path): `newDexPairs`, `ohlcvPairs`, `ohlcvTokens`, `updatePairs`, `updateTokens`, `walletActivity`.
